title: Billy's End Update
description: Update the End dimension with this modpack!
body:
<center> 

# ![Billy's End Update](https://i.imgur.com/MZgJXCP.png) 
</center>  

The **Billy's End Update** modpack aims to provide an awesome experience by adding dozens of mods that overhaul the End dimension! My modpack adds a lot, from getting to the End, to the new biomes, bosses, and a complete rework of the Ender Dragon Fight!

We strive to keep this modpack relevant by continually keeping it up-to-date

# ![Help](https://i.imgur.com/nmjDQkE.png)
You are able to add any additional mods you want yourself (if this causes any compatibility issues, feel free to ask for support in our [**Discord server**](https://discord.gg/SP3PQsynTW) and we'll try to help out).


# ![Shaders](https://i.imgur.com/30X2zVZ.png)
[**Complementary Reimagined**]([https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)) are the shaders that we went with because they had good lighting, were completely free, and, most importantly, looked good.


# ![Notable Mods](https://i.imgur.com/U5Q76CL.png)
Some other notable mods include [**End Remastered**](https://modrinth.com/mod/endrem), [**End's Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ends-delight), [**Enderman Overhaul**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderman-overhaul), [**Enderite Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderite-mod), [**YUNG's Better End Island**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-end-island), [**YUNG's Better Stongholds**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-strongholds), [**Nullscape**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nullscape), [**AdventureZ**](https://modrinth.com/mod/adventurez), [**MES - Moog's End Structures**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mes-moogs-end-structures), [**Better End**](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend), [**Ender Dragon Fight Remastered**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/edf-remastered), [**Towers of the Wild: Additions**](https://modrinth.com/mod/towers-of-the-wild-additions), [**Eldrich End**](https://modrinth.com/mod/eldritch-end), [**Bosses of Mass Destruction**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction), [**Ultris: Boss Expansion**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ultris), [**Void Totem**](https://modrinth.com/mod/voidtotem), [**Better End Cities for BetterEnd**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-end-cities-for-betterend)

# ![Installation](https://i.imgur.com/A2omPzb.png)
I recommend allocating additional RAM for better performance. Go with 6-8GB of ram. (Don't allocate over half the ram you have available.)

**1.** Download a launcher (We recommend [**ATLauncher**](https://atlauncher.com/downloads))

**2.** Go to the "**Packs**" tab, search for "**Billy's End Update**", click "**New Instance**", and then click "**Install**"
